stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 9, when a passenger and baggage arrive at an aerodrome, the State is requested to…

options.a: Adopt border control regulations suited to air transport and avoid unnecessary delays.
options.b: Prevent any delays caused by increased border and baggage controls.
options.c: Give priority inspection to first-class ticket holders.
options.d: Perform at least a double border control, with no time limitation on resulting delays.
